title: T-063 — UI: TEC-095 Traceability Search foundation (cross-tagged → 05-WAREHOUSE)
prompt: Build read-only traceability search foundation per §9.4 + §10A TEC-095. Audit CC-5 primary owner = 05-WAREHOUSE. Tech-side foundation provides the search input + result list. Match `traceability_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:823-901. RED tests/ui/tec-095-traceability.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-095-traceability.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Forward/backward lot-genealogy search foundation; full query lives in 05-WAREHOUSE.
pipeline_inputs.details: Search by item_code or lot. Result list links to /warehouse/lots/[lp_id] for full genealogy.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:823-901, then search bar, result list, and link styling match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given empty query, when on page, then prompt 'Enter item or lot' shows.
Given clicking a result row, when fired, then navigation goes to /warehouse/lots/[lp_id].
risk_red_lines: Do not implement full genealogy here.
